tasks.name: Baseline regression check (1269 tests)
tasks.prompt:
Run the full test suite for all completed engines. Run each SEPARATELY to avoid conftest collisions:
  python -m pytest engines/source/tests/ -v --tb=short
  python -m pytest engines/normalization/tests/ -v --tb=short
  python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -v --tb=short
Report: total tests, passed, failed, skipped, any error details.
Expected baseline: 566 source + 517 normalization + 186 excerpting = 1269 total.
Do NOT modify any files. Write results to overnight/results/val-test-regression/summary.md

tasks.name: Code review of Phase 3.1 deterministic implementation
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Thorough code review of Phase 3.1 deterministic metadata assembly.

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md first for project context.
Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md section 7.1 (lines 1397-1518) — the governing spec.
Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md section 6.2 (lines 1260-1340) — layer attribution rules LA-1 through LA-4.
Then read the FULL implementation: engines/excerpting/src/phase3_deterministic.py
Then read ALL tests: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase3_deterministic.py
Also read NEXT.md for design decisions DD-S3-1 through DD-S3-9.

Review for:
1. SPEC compliance — does each F-DET function match the SPEC algorithm exactly?
2. Arabic text safety — no .lower()/.upper()/.strip() on Arabic strings, no \d in regex (use [0-9])
3. LA-1 through LA-4 rule cascade — correct order (LA-4→LA-1→LA-2→LA-3), correct thresholds (100%, 80%)
4. Off-by-one errors in word-to-char conversion
5. Layer split point merging — segments with identical (type, author) separated by split points must be merged BEFORE computing coverage (DD-S3-7)
6. Evidence detection uses plain substring matching, NO word-boundary checks (DD-S3-8)
7. D-023 metadata pass-through — are all upstream fields preserved in ExcerptRecord?
8. Error handling — fails loudly with SPEC error codes (EX-M-001 for LA-3)?
9. school=None passed explicitly (DD-S3-6, DD8 Pattern 1)?
10. Test coverage — do the tests cover all 10 functions and all 4 LA rules?

Write detailed findings to overnight/results/review-phase3/review.md with:
- CRITICAL: bugs that produce wrong output
- HIGH: edge cases that could fail
- MEDIUM: code quality issues
- LOW: style/documentation

Do NOT modify any source files. This is a READ-ONLY review.

tasks.name: Phase 3.1 edge case and adversarial tests
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Write edge case and adversarial tests for Phase 3.1 deterministic functions.

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md first.
Read the review at overnight/results/review-phase3/review.md for any bugs found.
Read existing tests: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase3_deterministic.py
Read the implementation: engines/excerpting/src/phase3_deterministic.py

If the review found CRITICAL bugs, fix them FIRST in phase3_deterministic.py. Then write tests.

Append additional tests to engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase3_deterministic.py (do NOT overwrite existing tests):

1. Multi-layer attribution: sharh + matn + hashiyah (3 layers, LA-3 path)
2. Split chunk handling: split_info.chunk_index affects excerpt_id
3. Layer split point merging: consecutive segments at split boundary
4. Empty footnotes list: no footnotes in chunk
5. Quran verse with diacritics in ornate parentheses
6. Hadith marker detection: all patterns (rawahu, akhrajahu, etc.) — plain substring, NO word boundary
7. Consensus marker detection: all patterns (ajma'u, ijma', etc.) — plain substring, NO word boundary
8. Single-word teaching unit: start_word == end_word
9. Very long text (>1000 words): verify offsets are correct
10. Primary text extraction preserving paragraph breaks (\n\n)

IMPORTANT: Evidence detection uses plain substring matching — NO \b word-boundary checks (DD-S3-8).
Regex: use [0-9] not \d. Arabic: never .lower()/.upper()/.strip() on Arabic.
Use real Arabic text from tests/fixtures/ wherever possible.
Run: python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
All existing + new tests must pass.

tasks.name: Phase 1 edge case hardening tests
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Write additional edge case tests for Phase 1 (deterministic assembly).

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md. Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md section 4.
Read existing tests in engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase1_*.py to understand current coverage.

Write NEW test file: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase1_hardening.py with edge cases:
1. Empty division (no content units)
2. Single-word content unit
3. Division at exact MAX_CHUNK_WORDS boundary (5000 words)
4. Content unit with only footnotes, no text
5. Mixed Arabic/Latin text assembly
6. Division with maximum nesting depth
7. Consecutive divisions with same heading
8. Content unit with ZWNJ characters

Use conftest factories. Use real Arabic text from tests/fixtures/ wherever possible.
Regex: use [0-9] not \d. Arabic: never .lower()/.upper()/.strip() on Arabic.
Run: python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
All tests must pass.

tasks.name: Phase 2 edge case hardening tests
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Write additional edge case tests for Phase 2 (LLM classification + grouping).

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md. Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md section 5.
Read existing tests in engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase2_*.py.

Write NEW test file: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase2_hardening.py with edge cases:
1. Offset normalization: snippet with ZWNJ character
2. Offset normalization: snippet at exact boundary between tokens
3. Classification with single segment covering all text
4. Grouping with single unit covering all segments
5. Retry logic: verify error feedback NOT appended for ValidationError (DD-S2-8)
6. V-P2-14: LLM produces wildly wrong offsets (off by >100 words)
7. V-P2-15: all three containment levels with edge cases
8. Max token computation: exact boundary values (2000, 2001, 4000, 4001)

Use conftest factories. Mock the instructor client.
Regex: use [0-9] not \d. Arabic: never .lower()/.upper()/.strip() on Arabic.
Run: python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
All tests must pass.

tasks.name: Final regression test after all modifications
tasks.prompt:
Run the final full test suite after all overnight modifications. Run each engine SEPARATELY:
  python -m pytest engines/source/tests/ -v --tb=short
  python -m pytest engines/normalization/tests/ -v --tb=short
  python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -v --tb=short

Report: total tests, passed, failed, skipped.
Baseline was 1269 tests. New tests added by harden-phase1, harden-phase2, and impl-phase3-edge.
Write report to overnight/results/val-test-final/summary.md
